channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Morning Minute: Hyperliquid Is 'Bigger Than Nasdaq'
item.description: The man who built the modern NYSE just said Hyperliquid is bigger than Nasdaq. JPMorgan says the debasement trade is unwinding.

item.title: Hyperliquid bigger than NASDAQ, says ICE CEO Jeffrey Sprecher
item.description: Sprecher saluted Hyperliquid's team, signaling deeper engagement between Wall Street incumbents and crypto-native rails.

item.title: Strategy situation ‘out of hand,’ says Arca exec on $15B preferred stock burden
item.description: Strategy’s capital structure may be under pressure as Arca’s Jeff Dorman highlights $15 billion in preferred stock obligations and CEO comments on possible Bitcoin sales.

item.title: Ukrainian Police Officers Allegedly Kidnapped Crypto Entrepreneurs to Extort Millions
item.description: Prosecutors say two police colonels organized an extortion ring that allegedly tracked, abducted, and held crypto entrepreneurs at gunpoint.

item.title: Texas Bitcoin reserve plans shift from ETF to direct BTC custody
item.description: Texas is hiring a crypto custodian to move its $10 million Strategic Bitcoin Reserve from BlackRock’s IBIT ETF into directly held coins and build full state‑level BTC plumbing.

item.title: Bitcoin underperforms risk assets as record 9th day of ETF outflows signal waning demand
item.description: Your day-ahead look for May 29, 2026

item.title: DxSale drained for $7.3M in BNB Chain liquidity exploit
item.description: DxSale was drained for about $7.3 million from BNB Chain liquidity providers, raising fresh concerns over old DeFi locker contracts.

item.title: Bitcoin ETF outflows reach record 9-day streak as investors pull $2.8 billion
item.description: The longest run of withdrawals since U.S. spot bitcoin ETFs listed in January 2024 comes as bitcoin underperforms high-flying AI and semiconductor stocks.

item.title: Paxos Secures SEC Registration as Clearing Agency
item.description: The approval makes Paxos the “only blockchain-native firm” approved by the SEC to operate as a registered clearing agency in the U.S.

item.title: Bitcoin slides to April lows as crypto diverges from record-chasing U.S. equities
item.description: Bitcoin's failed breakout above $83,000 is looking increasingly like a bear market signal, even as S&P 500 and Nasdaq futures notch gains and approach all-time highs.

item.title: Once profit-taking cascades, Bitcoin investors' PnL typically falls for about 18 months. Since the trend turned in Oct 2025, the bear market could last until early 2027. The trend only changes when unrealized profits rise and realized profits fall. We're not there yet - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE1ielhicUFtNm1ZVmpoQVRxQ0FJaEkxc2NvU3B2bU5KRXpDakVmbXBwOVlDczRjU19lMzBycUw4WHJ0ZUM5ZlpGUkRMc2U0amVYd0hYZHVjRDFmQldtN25xLUl3?oc=5" target="_blank">Once profit-taking cascades, Bitco…

item.title: Kalshi follows CFTC in suing Minnesota over law criminalizing prediction markets
item.description: The Governor of Minnesota signed into law a measure that, starting Aug. 1, makes it a crime to advertise and operate prediction market platforms across the state.

item.title: Strategy's STRC slips below $99 as Strive captures investor attention
item.description: STRC has struggled to maintain its $100 target price, while Strategy's reduced cash reserves and dividend obligations are drawing increased investor attention.

item.title: OKX Ventures, Korea Investment & Securities to buy 19.6% Coinone stake for $106M
item.description: OKX Ventures and KIS to invest $53 million each for a 19.6% stake in Coinone, deepening ties between traditional finance and crypto in South Korea’s tightly regulated market.

item.title: Solana, Sui and Aptos wallet data targeted in TrapDoor package attack
item.description: The campaign targets crypto, DeFi, AI and security developers with fake tooling packages to steal wallets, SSH keys, GitHub tokens, cloud credentials and browser data.

item.title: JUST IN: 🇺🇸 SEC grants first blockchain-native company 'Paxos' approval to clear and settle securities transactions. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE9Vc1BHQjJXUWtKczNaM0JmMm1hNFZyUi05WUVCWnhlVDFvNGxjQW1IQ2d2ZmhhY1Z1ZlQ3enpHS21vVF9FVnRXd3Y0NHZneEJzb2ZkQXVQNmNEYnhTXzd4OUl3?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🇺🇸 SEC grants first blo…

item.title: OKX Ventures buys $53 million stake in Korea's Coinone exchange
item.description: The crypto exchange's investment arm and Korea Investment & Securities will each invest 80 billion won ($53 million) as Coinone pushes into stablecoins and tokenized securities.

item.title: Arca CIO Jeff Dorman: MSTR Situation Has Gotten Out of Hand Arca CIO Jeff Dorman said MSTR’s situation has “gotten out of hand,” arguing that Strategy’s roughly $15 billion in preferred stock carries about $1.5 billion in annual dividends. He said the compa - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE5FSTBPa2JCdnR4WDNHUWw2SWw0SEQ2Nm1pcENxNWdFdTFHakFrT29MY3E2UnV5T2pzbEJ6SkRjYUdSSkVCb2ZPQkMzSFdTYnhMVzdhVEVkMU9fRUZfUDM4M3B6VQ?oc=5" target="_blank">Arca CIO Jeff Dorman: MSTR Situa…

item.title: SEC approves Paxos as ‘blockchain-native’ clearing agency
item.description: Paxos says its approval as a blockchain-focused clearing agency represents a “critical piece of financial market infrastructure” as Wall Street becomes more interested in crypto.

item.title: XRP rebounds above $1.30 after volume surge, but bears still control the bigger picture
item.description: XRP snapped a streak of lower lows on heavy buying, though the token remains stuck below major resistance levels that have capped every rally this year.

item.title: Bitcoin, ether little-changed despite record stocks, falling oil and easing war fears
item.description: Global stocks hit records and oil cracked on a tentative US-Iran ceasefire extension. Crypto stayed on the sidelines, with some analysts saying the next catalyst is regulatory, not geopolitical.

item.title: Bitcoin’s major holders halt buys as demand slows: CryptoQuant
item.description: CryptoQuant says that the holding structure for large Bitcoin holders is deteriorating, a trend that has historically preceded “sustained price weakness.”

item.title: Bitcoin's record holder supply hides a buyer drought, CryptoQuant says
item.description: A record high in long-term holder supply typically signals conviction. CryptoQuant says it reflects a shortage of new buyers, a view echoed by weakening ETF demand and bearish prediction market odds.

item.title: Sui Network back online after ‘crash bug’ causes 6-hour outage
item.description: The Sui mainnet has resumed after a bug in a network update took it offline for 5 hours and 55 minutes.

item.title: Bitcoin’s trapped under $74K while $9B options expiry looms: Are bears back in control?
item.description: Bears hold the upper hand for Friday's $9 billion options expiry, keeping Bitcoin under pressure amid heavy ETF outflows and corporate selling

item.title: Buy $72K dip, or jump ship: What will Bitcoin bulls do?
item.description: Investors selling across spot, futures and ETF markets pushed Bitcoin into its monthly range lows near $72,000 but data shows retail investors buying the dip and opening longs.

item.title: Gemini taps Grok for personalized AI-powered prediction market feeds
item.description: Gemini is leaning into AI features for its prediction market, following other crypto exchanges in moving beyond crypto trading amid a market slump.

item.title: Solana open interest drops 30% as altcoins slump: Is $68 SOL next?
item.description: Bulls abandon ship as SOL futures open interest dropped 30% in May. With the price weakening near $80, Solana may be destined for new lows.

item.title: Fidelity Digital Assets highlights 'growing evidence' of shift from dollar-based systems
item.description: The investment firm said nation-states and central banks are increasingly turning to assets like Bitcoin and gold as alternative settlement systems outside of US control.

item.title: Prediction markets legal battles heat up in Minnesota, Rhode Island
item.description: Kalshi sued Minnesota while the CFTC filed against Rhode Island as legal wrangling with state-level authorities seems likely headed to the US Supreme Court.

item.title: Calamos bets protected Bitcoin ETFs can outlast crypto market swings
item.description: As more than $1 billion exited spot Bitcoin ETFs last week, Calamos says investors are rotating into Bitcoin products with built-in downside protection.

item.title: Bit Digital buys $20M worth of Ethereum, expands treasury to 158K ETH
item.description: The purchase pushed the Nasdaq-listed company ahead of Coinbase Global to become the fourth-largest public corporate holder of Ether, according to CoinGecko data.

item.title: Anthropic Nears $1 Trillion Valuation, Topping OpenAI After Fresh $65 Billion Raise
item.description: Claude maker Anthropic said annualized revenue surpassed $47 billion as it expands cloud and compute partnerships.

item.title: SEC Commissioner Peirce defends crypto privacy tools against surveillance push
item.description: The leader of the regulator's Crypto Task Force said privacy-enhancing technologies can strengthen investor protection and urged regulators not to treat them with suspicion.

item.title: Bitcoin enters cool-down phase under $75K as ‘active distribution’ rises
item.description: Bitcoin’s slide toward $73,000 triggered active distribution signals, but lowered realized losses and weak spot volumes point to easing sell pressure.

item.title: Trump claims he can ‘future proof’ crypto regulation with CLARITY Act
item.description: The future of a digital asset market structure bill in Congress is still uncertain amid concerns over ethics provisions, with the president, whose crypto ties are under scrutiny, weighing in on social media.

item.title: AI Agents Are Learning to Predict What Users Want—Before They Ask for It
item.description: Researchers in China built a model that uses an AI’s downtime to prepare for users’ next question before they ask it.

item.title: France's AMF regulator sets June 30 deadline for MiCA licensing
item.description: The European Union's Markets in Crypto Assets regulations first took effect in 2024, but gave crypto service providers time to fully comply with the framework.

item.title: Sui Network Goes Down for Hours, Just Months After the Last Downtime
item.description: Blockchain network Sui is suffering another period of significant downtime barely five months after the last "network stall."

item.title: Crypto trading firm FalconX confidentially files with SEC for IPO, hires bankers
item.description: FalconX has hired Cantor and other bankers to advise on a potential IPO and confidentially filed draft paperwork with the SEC, though the listing is not expected until later this year amid volatile market conditions.

item.title: Apple iOS 27 Leaks: Siri Is Being Remade to Be More Like ChatGPT
item.description: Rendered illustrations published ahead of WWDC 2026 reveal a dedicated Siri app, Dynamic Island integration, and a Google Gemini backbone—the biggest overhaul to the assistant in nearly 15 years.

item.title: Why the Ethereum Foundation is suddenly again at the center of crypto’s culture war
item.description: In this week's edition of The Protocol Newsletter, we're diving deep into the institution that has been the main steward for the Ethereum blockchain, and why its been back in the spotlight.

item.title: Kalshi Sues to Stop Minnesota From Enforcing America’s First Prediction Market Ban
item.description: Prediction market giant Kalshi has asked a federal judge to prevent Minnesota from allowing the ban to go into effect in August.

item.title: Tether's U.S.-focused stablecoin grows over 500% in a month, but still lags main rivals
item.description: USAT's market cap jumped above $140 million in April, though it remains well behind Circle's USDC, PayPal's PYUSD and Ripple's RLUSD tokens.

item.title: Anthropic's Claude Opus 4.8 Is Here: Better AI Coding, Smarter Safety—Same Huge Price
item.description: Anthropic's latest flagship AI model Claude Opus 4.8 arrives with sharper reasoning, tighter alignment, and a price tag that hasn't budged.

item.title: Bitwise bets Hyperliquid could power future finance as HYPE ETFs gain traction
item.description: Bitwise says investor demand for Hyperliquid exposure is surging as new HYPE ETFs launch.

item.title: Anthropic's Claude Mythos AI Model Nearing Release After Raising Cybersecurity Alarms
item.description: Anthropic signaled that broader access to its controversial Claude Mythos AI models may arrive "in the coming weeks" after limited testing.

item.title: Bitcoin Whales Are Pulling Back as Activity 'Mirrors' 2022 Bear Market: Analysts
item.description: Current Bitcoin whale activity is similar in nature to the last bear market in 2022 when BTC fell precipitously, according to on-chain data.

item.title: What the Clarity Act Means for the Rest of the World
item.description: The Senate’s crypto bill has supporters excited—and opponents concerned—about the bill’s potential reverberations beyond America’s borders.

item.title: Hyperliquid's pre-IPO SpaceX contracts suffer 45% flash crash, liquidating $1.5 million
item.description: A massive selloff in a SpaceX crypto token wiped out hundreds of retail traders in 30 minutes because the market lacked enough cash to absorb the shock.

item.title: Trezor adds native USDt, USDC yield via Morpho integration
item.description: The feature lets users earn stablecoin yield directly through Trezor Suite without connecting external wallets or using separate DeFi apps.

item.title: JUST IN: Fidelity Digital Assets says Iran accepting Bitcoin payments for Strait of Hormuz tolls supports 'growing evidence about a shift away from dollar-based systems.' 👀 🇮🇷 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE1NcHB3cEVXMW9hX24yOUdXamlBaXpkNW5zaldQc3E2amF1MjZVLUJCTVkxQVRmUktna2IzcEVsOTVhMzFnSDBCdTNLWU9NdlRXbjFyQ29DRWRqZi1hZWoycHJ5M1cxVjg?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Fidelity Digital A…

item.title: French company abandons crypto treasury strategy, will liquidate Bitcoin holdings
item.description: In the year since Sequans Communications announced that it would adopt a digital asset treasury strategy, the price of Bitcoin fell by more than 30%.

item.title: UniCredit warns Europe may struggle to contain crypto-bank crisis under MiCA rules
item.description: EU deposit insurance (up to €100,000) may not absorb stress from large stablecoin reserve accounts, unlike the full protection offered by U.S. regulators.

item.title: Machi Big Brother Relaxes Poolside After Latest Crypto Wi... - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiV0FVX3lxTE5OY0NydWxPTnR1bmFQY0ppRzR5TkxJdktULXNSN05QSE9ScGR4d1dZNGRsVzExU0YyMHNpMlhHWVY3VXMzandvVWhpMi0wVlFhY1p5bVcyNA?oc=5" target="_blank">Machi Big Brother Relaxes Poolside After Latest …

item.title: Toddlers learn by falling: Why DeFi's $20 billion TVL drop is just a market stress-test
item.description: DeFi Technologies president Andrew Forson says the stablecoin layer is thriving, with more than $150 billion in U.S. Treasuries backing coins like USDT and USDC.

item.title: Google Engineer Charged Over $2.75 Million in Alleged Polymarket Insider Trading Bets
item.description: The Google employee case is the second federal prosecution tied to alleged prediction market insider trading on Polymarket.

item.title: Sui blockchain suffers another network outage as transactions grind to a halt
item.description: This is the second time this year that the Sui network has suffered an outage.

item.title: Standard Chartered Reaffirms $40K Ethereum Price Target Due to DeFi Dominance
item.description: Analysts compared Ethereum's current position to Amazon following the dot-com bubble burst.

item.title: Bitcoin Traders Increasingly Convinced Price Will Fall Below $70K by End of May
item.description: Prediction market odds are rising for Bitcoin to drop below $70,000 in the next few days following a dip to a six-week low price.
